errors: The ELM implementation uses a HbA1c threshold of **9 g%** (listed under “Time Intervals (Lookback Periods)”), whereas the CPG requires a HbA1c value **≥ 6.5 %**. This numeric value does not match the guideline specification. Age threshold (≥ 18 years) is correct. No other mismatches identified.

; The CPG requires that a DEXA scan **with a result present** within the past 2 years excludes the patient from screening. The ELM summary only checks “No DEXA scan performed in the past 2 years” and does not verify that a result is present, so the look‑back condition is incomplete. All other numeric values (age ≥ 65, 2‑year interval) and value set OIDs match the guideline.

; Age threshold mismatch: CPG requires minimum age ≥ 18 years, but ELM uses ≥ 25 years.; Look‑back period mismatch for blood‑pressure screening encounter: CPG specifies a 12‑month (1‑year) interval, but ELM uses a 6‑month interval.

; The ELM implementation only checks for a tobacco user (value set `2.16.840.1.113883.3.526.3.1170`) but does **not** enforce the required smoking history of **≥ 20 pack‑years** as stated in the CPG.; The ELM does not verify that a former smoker has **quit within the past 15 years**, which is a mandatory inclusion criterion in the guideline.; All other numeric values (age ≥ 50, age ≤ 80, LDCT look‑back period of 1 year) match the CPG, but the missing pack‑year and quit‑time constraints make the implementation non‑conformant.

; **BMI threshold mismatch**: CPG requires BMI ≥ 25 kg/m², but the ELM implementation lists a threshold of **35 kg/m²**.; **Glucose/HbA1c test look‑back period mismatch**: CPG specifies “no test in the past **3 years**,” whereas the ELM implementation uses a look‑back of **1 year**.

; Age lower bound mismatch: CPG requires Age ≥ 45 years, but ELM uses Age ≥ 60 years.; Look‑back period for recent colorectal screening mismatch: CPG defines “screening performed within the past 1 year” as the exclusion criterion, whereas ELM uses a 2‑year interval.

The ELM implementation uses a 6‑month look‑back period for “Has Recent Anxiety Screening,” but the CPG requires a 1‑year look‑back period to determine if a prior anxiety disorder screening has been performed. This time interval does not match the guideline specification. All other values (age ≥ 18 and the GAD screening value set) are correct.

The ELM implementation sets the upper age limit to **80 years**, whereas the CPG requires the upper age limit to be **85 years** (30‑85 years inclusive). All other numeric values (lower age limit of 30 years, LDL threshold of ≥190 mg/dL, and the LDL value set identifier) match the guideline.
; Age threshold in ELM is set to **>= 30 years**, but the CPG requires **age ≥ 15 years and ≤ 65 years**. The upper age limit (65) is also missing from the ELM implementation.
